creator: markd@grizzly.com
text:
Its just ever so slightly annoying that the upgrade install
        displays files that need merged by hand on an upgrad and tells
        you to write them down instead of saving the names to a file.
        Other than this, the upgrade is *very* useful, especially if
        one knows how to use emacs emerge!

Fix: 

Save the names to some well known file and tell the user
        about it.
